name: devbyalex
description: An autonomous, stage-gated app-building workflow: plan (spec → implementation guide → wireframes), dev (scaffold → auth → per-feature build/validate loop + cosmetic tweak and planned-change lanes), launch readiness (incl. observability wiring), and live (post-launch feedback triaged back into the loop). Ships init-ai to bootstrap or integrate the workflow into any repo, plus the orchestrator skills and specialist agents that drive each stage. dev-goal drives the dev stage: give it a goal and it pushes until the app is stable, then iteration lives in the bug/tweak/todo lanes.
